'''yadhocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:caballer|caballer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caballer|caballer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yadhocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yædhecheth|yædhecheth]] || [[word:yædhechej|yædhechej]] || [[word:yædhechesh|yædhechesh]] || [[word:yædheche|yædheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadhodhochoth|yadhodhochoth]] || [[word:yadhodhochoj|yadhodhochoj]] || [[word:yadhodhochosh|yadhodhochosh]] || [[word:yadhodhocho|yadhodhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadhochoth|yadhochoth]] || [[word:yadhochoj|yadhochoj]] || [[word:yadhochosh|yadhochosh]] || [[word:yadhocho|yadhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadhofchoth|yadhofchoth]] || [[word:yadhofchoj|yadhofchoj]] || [[word:yadhofchosh|yadhofchosh]] || [[word:yadhofchof|yadhofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yadhochotho|yadhochotho]] || [[word:yadhochojo|yadhochojo]] || [[word:yadhochosho|yadhochosho]] || [[word:yadhochoko|yadhochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yadhochoth|yadhochoth]] || [[word:yadhochoj|yadhochoj]] || [[word:yadhochosh|yadhochosh]] || [[word:yadhocho|yadhocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yadhochothol|yadhochothol]] || [[word:yadhochojol|yadhochojol]] || [[word:yadhochoshol|yadhochoshol]] || [[word:yadhochokol|yadhochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yadhochothotho|yadhochothotho]] || [[word:yadhochojojo|yadhochojojo]] || [[word:yadhochoshosho|yadhochoshosho]] || [[word:yadhochoko|yadhochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yadhochothon|yadhochothon]] || [[word:yadhochojon|yadhochojon]] || [[word:yadhochoshon|yadhochoshon]] || [[word:yadhochokon|yadhochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yadhochothoro|yadhochothoro]] || [[word:yadhochojoro|yadhochojoro]] || [[word:yadhochoshoro|yadhochoshoro]] || [[word:yadhochokoro|yadhochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
